历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 1905 → 2217 → 2533 → 3373 → 3733, showing a continuous and significant backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1828 places in the past 5 years and about 1200 places in the past 3 years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 3733. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Chongqing was 65 in 2021, 66 in 2022, 63 in 2023, 64 in 2024, and 64 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 66, an increase of 2 students (+3.1%) compared to 2025, with a limited expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class university; ranked 19th (Top20) in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with stable rankings in recent years, belonging to the top comprehensive normal university in China. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranking is 37th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure. Historical admission anomalies only occurred in Jiangxi Province in 2022 with a ranking drop, and no gap records in Chongqing. Education A+, Psychology A+, Mathematics A, Physics A-, Geography A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A, Systems Science A-, Statistics A, etc., with outstanding strength in basic science disciplines, attractive for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science is highly recommended in 2026 social heat, Electronics/Communication is highly recommended, Electrical Engineering and Automation is highly recommended, and science and engineering majors overall have high heat. The number of Physics Category candidates in this province was 98,954 in 2021 → 139,478 in 2025, with continuous significant growth (+41%). The total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Chongqing in 2026 is 209,000, estimated at about 135,850 based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 65%, a slight decrease from 2025. Provincial control line data for 2026 is missing. Beijing Normal University is located in Beijing, belonging to cross-province application. The university's enrollment scale for Physics Category in Chongqing is about 64–66 students, a medium scale. Regional preference data is missing.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous and significant backward trend in historical rankings (about 1828 places backward in the past 5 years), a small expansion of 2 students in 2026, a slight decrease in the number of Physics Category candidates in this province, and the overall high heat of science and engineering majors but intensified competition, based on the 2025 baseline of 3733, although the backward trend is weakly offset by expansion and a slight decrease in candidates, the overall competitive pressure remains high. The predicted minimum ranking is about 3853, with a range of 3414–4292.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<3414), you can focus on impacting Tier 1 flagship majors. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>4292), it is recommended to use Tier 3 Education as a safety option.
